rationale: Builds directly on the current best columnwise-MLP-expansion plus projection-EMA script. The change keeps full exact final roundtripping intact, but during late quant-aware training it now pushes only the most quantization-sensitive matrices hard toward the final manifold: both projection weights and the transposed MLP expansion weights. All other quantized tensors get only a light 0.15 roundtrip mix, which should preserve the 0053 gains while reducing unnecessary endgame disturbance to QKV and other matrices under the same 600s budget.
title: Selective Quant-Aware MLP Expansion Plus Projection Endgame
